name: fularani-foundation
description: This repository contains the source code for **fularanifoundation.org**, the official website of **Fularani Foundation**. The website is built using **React + Vite**, ensuring fast performance, scalability, and a modern development workflow.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix app" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix app && npm install --prefix backend
